channel.title: DDIA on Qianqian Shan
channel.description: Recent content in DDIA on Qianqian Shan

item.title: DDIA - Data Models and Query Languages
item.description: Overview Relational Model vs Document Model Query Languages for Data Graph-like Data Models Summary 1 Overview Data models are probably the most important part of devloping software for their profound effect on not only how the software is written, but also on how we thinkg about the problem that we are solving. Each layer of the applications is built by one data model on top of another, and each layer hides the complexity of the layers below it by providing a clean data model (abstraction), which allows different groups of people to work together effectively.

item.title: DDIA - Reliable Scalable and Maintainable Applications
item.description: Overview Reliability 2.1 Hardware Faults 2.2 Software Errors 2.3 Human Errors Scalability Maintainability 1 Overview With more applications are data-intensive (in terms of the amount of data, complexity of data, and the speed at which the data is changing), it is important to figure out which tools and which approaches are the most appropriate for the tasks, and it can be hard to combine tools when a single tool alone is not enough.
